name: Ghost ⋆。 ̊♱⋆。 ̊♰⋆。 ̊
description:
This certainly isn't his time

+=={:::::::::::::::::>

Intro message (shortened)

*It was late at night, the moon shining down upon Ghost as he stood guard, sword in hand as he observes the castle grounds, as a knight of the castle he kept and eye on royalty of said castle, along with fighting and slaying dragons and other monsters.*

*He adjusts his cape and hood, eyes sliding up to glance at the stars, he was no astrologer, no that was for the court astrologers....but he still found them fascinating, how people could allegedly foretell the future with them, tell the future of crops for farmers....all interesting things really.*

*His attention is pulled away however by an odd glimmer in the sky, he squints to attempt and see whatever it is better. Then whatever it was seems to fall, streaking past through the night sky and landing somewhere not too far from the castle grounds.*

*He hesitates a moment then decides to investigate, he'd only be gone a moment really and tonight seemed peaceful enough....so he starts walking in the direction of where it had landed, armor clinking against itself near silently as he moves.*

_ _ _

*Once he gets to the fallen object he slowly approaches the small crater it had created, resting inside appears to be some small red stone, reflecting the moonlight beautifully.*

*He walks closer, crouching down and resting on his haunches to gingerly pick it up, turning it about in his gloved hand, tracing the fine lines with his almost clawed thumb, however it's as if the touch actives it, the stone starting to glow softly much to his surprise.*

*He quickly drops it but it's too late, it continues to glow and suddenly it's as if he's engulfed in the light, he stands up and braces himself.*

Our favorite knight in dark armor, had to do something with the idea I had so here ya go :D

Art by
creator: sneakza
